prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1087名、1018名、1009名、1077名、1029名，整体在1009–1087名之间窄幅波动，近5年波动幅度仅约78名，2025年基准位次约1029名，显示该校在北京考生中位次极为稳定；2021–2024年该校在北京市综合类招生计划均为20人，2025年增至21人，2026年进一步扩招至27人，较2025年增加6人，增幅约28.6%，属于明显扩招，按供需关系将推高录取位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第7名，属于全国顶尖高校（C9联盟成员），层次极高，对北京考生有持续吸引力；2025年声誉评价为偏正面（李政道先生与中科大少年班渊源）；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（1起师德师风事件，教授因贪污助不合资格学生入读被判刑），但事件数量少、影响有限。抖音热度排名第12（高热），综合热度约418万，短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高。投档异常文件中未见中科大相关断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科包括数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程共8个；A学科包括材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理、管理科学与工程共4个；A-学科包括统计学、力学、仪器科学与技术、信息与通信工程、动力工程及工程热物理、环境科学与工程、地质学共7个；A-及以上合计19个，学科实力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等中科大优势专业大类在2026年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐或推荐，社会热度高；北京2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，竞争明显加剧；中科大位于安徽省合肥市，非北京本地高校，但作为C9顶尖名校，跨省报考热度不减；该校在北京招生占比极小（约0.5%左右），属全国性招生布局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅稳定（1009–1087名）、2026年大幅扩招（+28.6%，推高位次数字）与北京考生总数大幅增加（+29.7%，加剧竞争）两股力量基本对冲，但扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，且中科大作为顶尖C9高校报考热度持续稳定，预计2026年最低录取位次约1205名，区间1060–1350名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含华夏计算机科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班，含数学类/物理学类）
- 工科试验班（科技英才班，含计算机类/电子信息类/人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含人工智能/集成电路等）
- 数学类（含华罗庚数学科技英才班）
- 物理学类（含严济慈物理科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（量子未来技术试点班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天/人形机器人/未来能源及安全）
- 理科试验班类（统计大数据与商业AI试验班）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1205名，区间1060–1350名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主攻方向（数学类、物理学类、电子信息类），一档（计算机类、拔尖计划科技英才班）作为冲刺，三档作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1060名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（1350名附近）建议以二档为主、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 1087, 1018, 1009, 1077, and 1029 respectively, fluctuating narrowly between 1009 and 1087, with a fluctuation range of only about 78 over the past five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1029, indicating extremely stable rankings among Beijing candidates. From 2021 to 2024, the university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing was 20 students each year, increasing to 21 in 2025, and further expanding to 27 in 2026, an increase of 6 students compared to 2025, representing an increase of about 28.6%, which is a significant expansion. According to supply and demand, this will push the admission ranking higher (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top national university (member of the C9 League) with a very high level, continuously attracting Beijing candidates. In 2025, the reputation evaluation is slightly positive (related to Mr. Li Zhengdao and the USTC Junior Class). In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (one incident of teacher ethics, where a professor was sentenced for corruption in helping unqualified students gain admission), but the number of incidents is small and the impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 12th (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of about 4.18 million, and a large short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants. No records of admission interruptions related to USTC were found in the abnormal admission files. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A+ disciplines include Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering, totaling 8. A disciplines include Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 4. A- disciplines include Statistics, Mechanics, Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Geology, totaling 7. In total, there are 19 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: USTC's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended or recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis, with high social popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Beijing in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. USTC is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Beijing, but as a top C9 prestigious university, cross-provincial application enthusiasm remains high. The university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is very small (about 0.5%), belonging to a nationwide enrollment layout.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow and stable historical rankings (1009–1087), the significant expansion in 2026 (+28.6%, pushing the ranking number higher), and the substantial increase in the number of Beijing candidates (+29.7%, intensifying competition), these two forces largely offset each other. However, the expansion rate is slightly larger than the candidate growth rate, and as a top C9 university, USTC's application enthusiasm remains stable. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 1205, with a range of 1060–1350.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (including Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Top-notch Plan Science and Technology Elite Class, including Mathematics/Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Technology Elite Class, including Computer Science/Electronic Information/Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Artificial Intelligence/Integrated Circuits, etc.)
- Mathematics (including Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Physics (including Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace/Humanoid Robots/Future Energy and Safety)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics Big Data and Business AI Experimental Class)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1205, range 1060–1350. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Mathematics, Physics, Electronic Information), with Tier 1 (Computer Science, Top-notch Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1060), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 1350), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
